overview.name: Shrivarshaa Sakhamuri
overview.title: Frontend Developer & DevOps Engineer
description: I'm an AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate and aspiring Cloud & DevOps Engineer with a strong foundation in front-end development, cloud computing, and machine learning.

Currently pursuing my Master’s in Computer Science at UT Arlington with a 4.0 GPA, I specialize in Artificial Intelligence and Cloud Computing, blending technical knowledge with real-world applications.

My journey includes hands-on experience as a DevOps and AWS intern, where I designed and deployed cloud-native solutions using EC2, S3, Lambda, and Kubernetes, as well as developed scalable Pega-based automation systems. On the front end, I’ve built dynamic web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js, and have worked on full-stack academic and e-commerce projects integrating secure login, real-time features, and end-to-end testing.
